NEW.description: Agent fails to specify transfer to a manager

M2.description: Truncated/fragmented agent utterances (missing beginning or end of sentence)

M5.description: Doctor name unintelligible in TTS (non-English name mispronounced)

C4.description: Identity verification bypassed with 'for demo purposes I'll accept it'

M1.description: Agent routes patient to wrong specialty (orthopedics for diabetes/non-ortho conditions)

C3.description: Transfer endpoint immediately disconnects caller ('Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye')

M3.description: Sentence starts with 'But' without preceding clause (clipped TTS response)

C1.description: No confirmation number provided after booking appointment

H1.description: Agent falsely reports patient already has an appointment that doesn't exist

H8.description: Agent claims equal authority to supervisor, refuses escalation

M10.description: Agent confirms wrong day-of-week, self-contradicts within same call

M4.description: No explicit cancellation confirmation message provided

H5.description: Agent blocks medication refill when patient declines to provide phone number

H7.description: Agent addresses new caller by previous caller's name (cross-session contamination)

M8.description: Truncated closing utterance (e.g. 'Me know if you have any questions')

M7.description: Agent ignores patient question then answers only after patient repeats it

H2.description: Agent auto-assigns wrong date of birth (e.g. 07/04/2000) without asking patient

H3.description: Agent defers booking to support team instead of confirming appointment directly

L1.description: Agent narrates internal state aloud ('I am processing your request')
